data.content: Refined OpenCode model picker prefix stripping by extracting helper logic to src/lib/model-labels.ts, limiting common-prefix trimming to '/' and ':' boundaries, and preventing empty-label stripping. Added regression tests in src/lib/__tests__/model-labels.test.ts (decimal-prefix and empty-label guards). Searchable picker remains in settings-agents-section and now uses the shared helper. Quality gates run: lint (warnings only), tsc --noEmit, unit tests (119 files / 1860 tests), build (passes with NODE_ENV=production). Integrated on main and pushed to origin/main at 64bb470ed772.
